spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the relevant API surface (document.querySelector, text-decoration-skip-ink) with runtime script (~3095 chars) wired to live controls, in line with the feature summary.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface — 4 buttons, 1 inputs, 0 selects, 2 ranges — wired up via event listeners.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (auto, eight, latin, skips, systems, writing).

edge_cases.rationale: No visible edge case / fallback / error handling — only the happy path.

references.rationale: References section cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link directly.

design_system.rationale: 1 button rule(s) override `background` without also overriding `color`. The global button rule sets both, so this leaves the text colour inherited from the dark default (CLAUDE.md rule #6).

openQuestions.title: Add explicit edge case coverage
openQuestions.detail: Pick one failure mode the spec or chromestatus motivation calls out (unsupported browser, denied permission, empty input, etc.) and surface it as a distinct demo state alongside the happy path.

openQuestions.title: Pair every button background override with a colour override
openQuestions.detail: Audit the inline `<style>` block: each `button { background: ... }` (or `.foo-btn { background: ... }`) needs an explicit `color: ...` next to it. CLAUDE.md rule #6 documents the light-on-light invisibility bug this causes.

openQuestions.title: Manually verify against the spec text
openQuestions.detail: Reviewer-v1-subagent based the spec_match verdict on the chromestatus summary ("Add support for the `all` value for the CSS text-decoration-skip-ink property, as specified in https://drafts.csswg.org/css-text-decor-4/#text-decoration-skip-ink-property.  The `text-decoration-skip-ink` property already supports `auto` an") because reading the full spec for every concept was out of budget. A human or follow-up agent should diff the demo's actual behaviour against https://drafts.csswg.org/css-text-decor-4/#text-decoration-skip-ink-property to catch anything chromestatus glossed over.

summary: Concept ships ~3095 chars of script across 4 button(s) and 3 other control(s). hits 4 pass / 1 partial / 1 fail across the six rubric criteria.
